title: Smoked Haddock Hash
description: A hearty and flavorful dish that combines the richness of smoked haddock with the comfort of a hash. Perfect for a weekend brunch.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of butter and swirl to coat the pan.
Add the chopped onions and bell peppers and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the hash browns and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Place the smoked haddock fillets on top of the hash and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until cooked through.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the smoked haddock on top of the hash and garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
